history.summary: Core enforcement mutation-verified PASS, but diff broke 3 unmodified tests (F1), inverted documented READY_FOR_STUDY admissibility without a recorded decision (F2), and handoff validation set missed the breakage (repair 3).

Bounded repair delta re-review: all 3 required repairs verified complete; full suite green modulo 3 proven pre-existing env failures; enforcement core byte-stable since the mutation-verified review (diff-stat delta 330/32 - 306/19 accounted exactly by 5 docs amendments + 2 one-line fixture flips).

findings.summary: Repair 1 VERIFIED: tests/no_lookahead/research_runtime/test_input_resolver_available_ts.py:199 and tests/integration/runtime/test_smoke.py:167 each flipped READY_FOR_STUDY->REGISTERED (one line each, no assertion added/deleted/relaxed anywhere in the delta). Availability-gate assertions exercised again (reason codes label_available_ts_precedes_event_ts / *_available_ts_missing only producible by the availability gates); test_smoke.py:62 asserts RuntimeSmokeStatus.PASS strictly. Both files 8 passed.

Repair 2 VERIFIED: spec section 'Admissibility decision (coordinator, 2026-06-11T15:45Z)' records REGISTERED-only; all 5 contradicting docs (docs/feature_label_foundation/LABEL_STORE.md, README.md, guide/README.md, guide/request_to_study.md, guide/safety_semantics.md) amended with a dated 2026-06-11 note stating exactly the verified facts: READY_FOR_STUDY reserved, no production writer, runtime pack resolution admits REGISTERED only, not runtime-admissible until a reviewed promotion API explicitly extends admissibility; research-only 'not a result claim' language preserved; no overclaiming.

F3 sweep VERIFIED NOT GATE-ROUTED: all 10 remaining READY_FOR_STUDY test references audited individually (test_session_label_guard.py:288, test_no_lookahead_audit.py:162, test_no_lookahead_runtime_audit.py:172, test_signal_probe_runtime.py:195, test_label_diagnostics_runtime.py:165+255, test_e2e_dryrun.py:304/306/353/946). All construct post-gate output objects directly (LabelPackHandle/RuntimeInputPack dataclass imports, zero resolve_runtime_input_pack/FeatureLabelPackResolver calls) or are pure data/enum-progression literals (e2e_dryrun has no resolver import at all; diagnostics :255 is a string in a synthetic audit-report dict). The gate's only consumer entry points are input_resolver.py:470 and :544 inside the resolver; none of the 10 reach them. No missed repair.

Repair 3 VERIFIED: handoff gained 'Bounded repair attempt 1 validation' with full-suite counts (3 failed, 2830 passed, 1 skipped), the 3 named pre-existing failures, and base-archive triage at 6f405bc reproducing all 3. Every claim reproduced by the re-reviewer; consistent with the original review's stash-baseline triage.

Independent re-validation in worktree: pytest tests/unit tests/no_lookahead tests/integration -q = 3 failed, 2830 passed, 1 skipped (failures exactly databento_canonicalize quality coverage, duckdb_query_fixture, polars_lazy_fixture - all pre-existing at base; the 3 F1 diff-caused failures are gone); tools/verify.py --smoke exit 0; canary_runner all Frontier canaries passed; git ls-files runs empty; git diff --check clean; no values/SQLite/heavy artifacts in delta; all changes unstaged.

Enforcement core byte-stable since the mutation-verified original review: diff stat grew 306(+)/19(-) -> 330(+)/32(-), and the +24/-13 delta is exactly the 5 docs amendments (+22/-11) plus the 2 fixture flips (+2/-2); no src/ file changed since review. Mutation results below remain valid.

No separate decisions/ entry was added for the admissibility decision; it is durably recorded in the committed spec section + 5 amended docs. Non-blocking (repair contract anchored to the spec section), recorded for completeness.

The 10 remaining READY_FOR_STUDY fixtures depict a now-reserved state on non-gate paths. Harmless and justified (none gate-routed; e2e_dryrun legitimately tests the enum lifecycle progression), but they will read oddly against the amended docs; candidate for a later hygiene sweep.
Original F4 (case-normalization via .strip().upper() admits lowercase 'registered') and F5 (test seeding via private registry._persist_label) notes stand unchanged.

Original review pass findings P1-P6 (fixture honesty, no assertion weakening, forbidden paths untouched, audit access preserved, error semantics, artifact policy) carry forward unchanged; core not re-reviewed per bounded-repair contract.
